description: AWS EC2 sibling deployment provider contract for seam-backed runtime preparation and DNS exposure.

config.target_instance_id: ProvisionedInstance UUID or AWS EC2 instance ID for sibling runtime.
config.instance_type: Requested EC2 instance class for sibling environments (for example t3.small).
config.remote_root: Remote root path on the target instance.
config.hostname: Public hostname to expose (for example deal.xyence.io).
config.dns_provider: DNS provider profile and credentials reference (Route53 expected for AWS).

operations.prepare_runtime_target: Validate target/profile inputs and produce execution-preflight metadata.
operations.prepare_dns_target: Validate DNS exposure requirements and derive DNS preparation actions.
operations.execution_preflight: Evaluate deploy-adjacent readiness without performing destructive apply.

constraints.execution_scope: Non-destructive seam contract only; deploy/apply execution is out of scope in this slice.
